name: mojo-gradient-type-naming
description: Fix naming inconsistency between generic gradient container types and domain-specific backward pass results in Mojo ML code. Use when: (1) a backward function returns a generic GradientPair/GradientQuad with opaque field names (grad_a, grad_b) but the caller knows the semantic meaning, (2) different backward functions for the same operation (with-bias vs without-bias) return different types with inconsistent field names, (3) call sites accessing .grad_a/.grad_b need to be updated to semantically named fields.
